name: KakaoTalk
description: Specs and technical requirements for KakaoTalk personal profiles, channel content, and business messaging.

items.name: Profile Photo
items.notes: Circular display in chat; full photo shown on profile tap

items.name: Profile Background Image
items.notes: Shown as a full-screen background on the personal profile card

items.name: KakaoTalk Channel Cover
items.notes: Square icon for business Kakao Channels; shown in search and chat

items.name: Chat Image
items.notes: Shared in personal or group chats; GIFs play inline

items.name: Custom Emoticon / Sticker
items.notes: Transparent background; animated stickers use GIF; submitted via KakaoEmoticon Studio

items.name: Chat Video
items.notes: Shared directly in chat; H.264 + AAC recommended

items.name: Voice Message
items.notes: Recorded in-app via the voice message feature

items.name: Status Message (Profile)
items.notes: Short status shown below the display name on the profile card

items.name: Channel Post (Business)
items.notes: Text limit for Kakao Channel feed posts sent to subscribers

items.name: Kakao Channel Message — Image
items.notes: Image included in branded channel messages sent to subscribers

items.name: KakaoTalk Biz Board (Banner Ad)
items.notes: Prominent banner ad shown in the chat list; managed via Kakao Ads

items.name: Carousel Feed Ad
items.notes: Up to 5 cards; shown in KakaoTalk channel feed and Kakao Story
